improvements: Require the implementor to include a verifiable manual/integration TRAPI validation path for acceptance criteria that depend on external model output.
Require tests to validate schema semantics (field presence and type intent) instead of brittle exact-string schema literals.
Require external/manual tests to be explicit opt-in (for example RUN_MANUAL_TRAPI_TESTS=true) so CI remains deterministic.
Require integration tests to load prompt content from the version-controlled prompt artifact being validated.
When PR creation tooling is unavailable, require recording an explicit compare URL and a placeholder PR identifier.
